name: Charger Red Light
headline: Charger indicator is solid red
symptom_text: Customer reports the charger indicator is red and charging cannot start.

name: Charger No Light
headline: Charger has no indicator light
symptom_text: The charger has no light and appears unpowered.

name: Charger Serial / Brand
headline: Charger identity label is visible
photo_hint: charger serial number label visible brand model label visible
symptom_text: Serial SN 260301982 and brand Proton eMAS are visible on the charger.

name: EVDB Single Phase
headline: Single-phase EVDB with 40A 2P labels
photo_hint: EVDB single phase MCB 40A 2P RCCB 40A Type A 2P
symptom_text: Single phase EVDB labels are visible for MCB 40A 2P and RCCB 40A Type A 2P.

name: EVDB Three Phase
headline: Three-phase EVDB with 40A 4P labels
photo_hint: EVDB three phase MCB 40A 4P RCCB 40A Type A 4P
symptom_text: Three phase EVDB labels are visible for MCB 40A 4P and RCCB 40A Type A 4P.

name: MCB Tripped
headline: EVDB breaker appears tripped
symptom_text: The MCB in the EVDB appears tripped and the charger has stopped.

name: Missing MCB / RCCB
headline: EVDB appears to be missing protection components
photo_hint: EVDB missing RCCB no RCCB visible
symptom_text: The EVDB photo appears to show a missing RCCB protection component.

name: Isolator OFF
headline: Isolator is OFF / open circuit
photo_hint: isolator off open circuit switch off
symptom_text: The isolator switch is OFF and the charger has no power.

name: Blinking Red - Emergency Stop
headline: Charger has blinking red light with seven flashes
symptom_text: The red indicator is blinking and the customer counted 7 flashes.
